author: mark
text:
No-git mode: bl works without a git repo

bl init --tasks-dir /path works outside git. Flat JSON task files,
no git ops. All commands work; claim requires --no-worktree;
review/close auto-detect and do status flips. Store.no_git field
and new pub functions (claim_no_worktree, drop_no_worktree,
review_no_git, close_no_git) for library consumers.

Fixes stealth close_and_archive skipping parent bookkeeping.
Extracts commit_init to store_init.rs. 19 new integration tests.
100% coverage on 2091 lines. README and SKILL.md updated.
